title: Proof of Payment
description: Proof of Payment is a wallet-generated transaction-shaped proof that demonstrates control of the credentials needed to spend the inputs of a prior payment, without exposing a password or personal identity.

resources.title: BIP 120: Proof of Payment
resources.notes: Specification for generating and validating a one-time proof tied to a previous payment.

resources.title: BIP 121: Proof of Payment URI Scheme
resources.notes: Historical companion for transporting proof-of-payment requests.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background on transaction authorization, signatures, and wallet-controlled credentials.
